calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-17-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd Butler. Charles Zhang was sworn as Cantonese Interpreter for the plaintiff. Plaintiff, Betty Guo was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Daman Kuang. Decree signed in open court.
